artifact: rmux-web-crypto WASM (production, X25519 + ML-KEM-768 hybrid, ClientSession only)

source.source_commit_note: The rmux commit these artifacts were built from. Re-stamped by scripts/build-web-crypto-wasm.sh on regeneration.

toolchain.rustc_note: Exact rustc that reproduces these bytes. verify-wasm-from-source.mjs exports it as RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN so a floating 'stable' runner cannot silently change codegen.
toolchain.wasm_bindgen_note: These bytes are produced by wasm-pack 0.13.1's PINNED, DOWNLOADED prebuilt wasm-bindgen 0.2.123 — not a source-built cli. A `cargo install wasm-bindgen-cli --version 0.2.123` built from source emits the same .js glue but a DIFFERENT .wasm, so reproduction must use wasm-pack's prebuilt path (no conflicting wasm-bindgen on PATH). Building the cli reproducibly from source is tracked future hardening.

build_command: wasm-pack build crates/rmux-web-crypto --release --target web --out-name rmux_web_crypto_wasm -- --no-default-features --features wasm
verification: Two gates. (1) scripts/verify-wasm-provenance.mjs runs on every build: committed bytes must match these hashes recorded in the same diff. (2) scripts/verify-wasm-from-source.mjs is the source-to-binary gate: it rebuilds this production blob from the public rmux source at source_commit (via scripts/build-web-crypto-wasm.sh wasm, pinned toolchain) and asserts byte-for-byte equality. CI blocks deploy if the commit is not reachable or if the rebuilt bytes differ.
